name: sophiewell.com
description: Sophie Well - 473 deterministic healthcare calculators tuned to the nurse on shift. Free, client-side, no servers, no telemetry, no AI.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:a11y && node scripts/grep-check.mjs && npm run data:verify
scripts.lint: eslint . && node scripts/grep-check.mjs && node scripts/check-output-safety.mjs && node scripts/check-citations.mjs && node scripts/check-catalog-truth.mjs && node scripts/check-commitments.mjs && node scripts/check-pa-staleness.mjs && node scripts/audit-pa.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run sbom && npm run build
